MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GENEVEVE TORIO'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND EXPERT FEES

Appearances:
Frank P. Sarro (439.8877) appearing for plaintiff and moving party
Holly L. Sutton of Farella Braun & Martel (954.4400) for defendant and responding party Abercrombie & Fitch Stores, Inc.

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Fees awarded in the amount of $84,426.25, representing the claimed hours at a rate of $425 per hour, which the court deems reasonable in light of the evidence concerning market rates, counsel's experience and reputation, the range of services included in the billed time, and the conduct of the case. Order and judgment signed in open court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

The motion is granted as it seeks answers to questions about Facebook and MySpace content. The response as to the statement is sufficient. The motion is denied as it seeks tax returns.
